channel.title: RTCore64 on vari.sh's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in RTCore64 on vari.sh's Blog

item.title: Doppelganger: Cloning and Dumping LSASS to Evade Detection
item.description: Overview of the Doppelganger technique for dumping LSASS via cloning, featuring obfuscation and security solutions detection bypass.
